criteria.label: Implementation Effort
criteria.description: Time and internal resource requirements to deploy and configure the CRM.

criteria.label: Integration Capability
criteria.description: Ability to connect with existing consultancy tools and data stacks.

criteria.label: Total Cost of Ownership
criteria.description: Combined cost of licensing, implementation, and ongoing maintenance over 3 years.

criteria.label: GDPR Compliance
criteria.description: Full adherence to EU data protection regulations.

criteria.label: Data Residency
criteria.description: Requirement for data to be hosted and processed within the EU.

criteria.label: Lock-in Risk
criteria.description: Ease of data portability and contract exit terms.

criteria.label: Sustainability Credentials
criteria.description: Vendor's commitment to ESG and carbon footprint transparency.
